it_cue: Italy! Titli! Dekho, Italy looks like a big boot kicking a football! Pizza and pasta come from Italy. Yummy yummy!
it_findcap: Rome! Where does Rome live? Find Rome's country!
fr_cue: France! Here stands the tall tall Eiffel Tower — so high, it touches the clouds! And flaky croissants — nom nom!
fr_findcap: Paris! Where does Paris live? Find Paris's country!
es_cue: Spain! Here people throw tomatoes at each other for fun! Splat splat splat! What a masti!
es_findcap: Madrid! Where does Madrid live? Find Madrid's country!
pt_cue: Portugal! Ronaldo plays football here. Goal! Siuuu!
pt_findcap: Lisbon! Where does Lisbon live? Find Lisbon's country!
ch_cue: Switzerland! Snowy snowy mountains and the yummiest chocolate in the world. A chocolate mountain!
ch_findcap: Bern! Where does Bern live? Find Bern's country!
gb_cue: United Kingdom! London Bridge is falling down, falling down! And the big clock Big Ben goes dong, dong, dong!
gb_findcap: London! Where does London live? Find London's country!
ie_cue: Ireland! Everything here is green green green — like one big garden!
ie_findcap: Dublin! Where does Dublin live? Find Dublin's country!
is_cue: Iceland! Brrr, so cold! Land of ice and fire — volcanoes go boom and ice is everywhere!
is_findcap: Reykjavik! Where does Reykjavik live? Find Reykjavik's country!
nl_cue: Netherlands! Windmills go round and round and round, and tulip flowers smile everywhere!
nl_findcap: Amsterdam! Where does Amsterdam live? Find Amsterdam's country!
be_cue: Belgium! Waffles and chocolates! Nom nom nom! Pet bhar gaya!
be_findcap: Brussels! Where does Brussels live? Find Brussels' country!
de_cue: Germany! Vroom vroom! Fast fast cars are made here — zoom, off they go!
de_findcap: Berlin! Where does Berlin live? Find Berlin's country!
at_cue: Austria! La la la! The land of music — even the mountains want to sing and dance!
at_findcap: Vienna! Where does Vienna live? Find Vienna's country!
cz_cue: Czech Republic! Check check! Such a funny name, na? Czech Republic — check check check!
cz_findcap: Prague! Where does Prague live? Find Prague's country!
pl_cue: Poland! Yummy dumplings called pierogi live here — like little potato pockets! Just like momos!
pl_findcap: Warsaw! Where does Warsaw live? Find Warsaw's country!
lu_cue: Luxembourg! So tiny tiny, but so rich — a little treasure box country!
lu_findcap: Luxembourg City! Where does Luxembourg City live? Find its country!
dk_cue: Denmark! LEGO blocks come from here! Build build build — a tower up to the sky!
dk_findcap: Copenhagen! Where does Copenhagen live? Find Copenhagen's country!
no_cue: Norway! Reindeer live here, and magic green lights dance in the night sky! Wow!
no_findcap: Oslo! Where does Oslo live? Find Oslo's country!
se_cue: Sweden! Yummy meatballs! And IKEA — where whole cupboards come packed in flat boxes!
se_findcap: Stockholm! Where does Stockholm live? Find Stockholm's country!
fi_cue: Finland! Shhh… Santa Claus lives here! Ho ho ho! Merry Christmas!
fi_findcap: Helsinki! Where does Helsinki live? Find Helsinki's country!
ee_cue: Estonia! A little country that loves computers and robots! Beep beep boop!
ee_findcap: Tallinn! Where does Tallinn live? Find Tallinn's country!
lv_cue: Latvia! Full of forests — trees, trees, everywhere trees!
lv_findcap: Riga! Where does Riga live? Find Riga's country!
lt_cue: Lithuania! Everyone here loves basketball! Dribble dribble, jump — dunk!
lt_findcap: Vilnius! Where does Vilnius live? Find Vilnius's country!
by_cue: Belarus! Big green forests where bison live — big woolly buffaloes with grumpy faces!
by_findcap: Minsk! Where does Minsk live? Find Minsk's country!
ua_cue: Ukraine! Fields and fields of yellow sunflowers, all smiling at the sun!
ua_findcap: Kyiv! Where does Kyiv live? Find Kyiv's country!
ru_cue: Russia! The biggest country in the whole wide world! Matryoshka dolls live here — a doll inside a doll inside a doll!
ru_findcap: Moscow! Where does Moscow live? Find Moscow's country!
md_cue: Moldova! Sweet sweet grapes grow here — angoor! So many angoor!
md_findcap: Chisinau! Where does Chisinau live? Find Chisinau's country!
hu_cue: Hungary! Are you hungry? Hungary! Hee hee! They eat a yummy red soup called goulash!
hu_findcap: Budapest! Where does Budapest live? Find Budapest's country!
ro_cue: Romania! Big fairy-tale castles sit on the hills here — just like in storybooks!
ro_findcap: Bucharest! Where does Bucharest live? Find Bucharest's country!
bg_cue: Bulgaria! The valley of roses! Pink pink flowers everywhere — mmm, what a lovely smell!
bg_findcap: Sofia! Where does Sofia live? Find Sofia's country!
gr_cue: Greece! Very very old country! Blue blue sea, little white houses, and creamy yogurt — yum!
gr_findcap: Athens! Where does Athens live? Find Athens' country!
hr_cue: Croatia! Dalmatian doggies with black spots come from here — woof woof, like one hundred and one Dalmatians!
hr_findcap: Zagreb! Where does Zagreb live? Find Zagreb's country!
rs_cue: Serbia! Raspberry country! Little red berries — so sweet, so juicy!
rs_findcap: Belgrade! Where does Belgrade live? Find Belgrade's country!
sk_cue: Slovakia! Mountains full of castles — so many castles, a castle on every hill!
sk_findcap: Bratislava! Where does Bratislava live? Find Bratislava's country!
si_cue: Slovenia! The country with love inside its name! S, LOVE, nia! And a pretty lake with a tiny island!
si_findcap: Ljubljana! Where does Ljubljana live? Find Ljubljana's country!
ba_cue: Bosnia! Old old bridges where brave people jump — splash! — into the river!
ba_findcap: Sarajevo! Where does Sarajevo live? Find Sarajevo's country!
me_cue: Montenegro! It means Black Mountain! A country named after a big black mountain!
me_findcap: Podgorica! Where does Podgorica live? Find Podgorica's country!
al_cue: Albania! The land of eagles — big big birds flying high high in the sky!
al_findcap: Tirana! Where does Tirana live? Find Tirana's country!
mk_cue: North Macedonia! Statues everywhere! Statue statue! Nobody move — statue!
mk_findcap: Skopje! Where does Skopje live? Find Skopje's country!
xk_cue: Kosovo! A baby country — one of the newest countries in the whole world! Goo goo ga ga!
xk_findcap: Pristina! Where does Pristina live? Find Pristina's country!
welcome: Namaste! Welcome to your world of maps! Chalo, let's play!
mode_puzzle: Puzzle time! Drag each country to its home on the map!
mode_flags: Flag hunt! Look at the flag and tap its country!
mode_capitals: Capital game! Listen, and find the right country!
level_done: Hooray! Level complete! Clap clap clap!
all_done: Wow! You finished the whole map of Europe! You are a champion!
flag_prompt: Look at this flag! Which country does it belong to? Tap it!
